---
title: "DATA-399 (project)"
output: html_document
---


# Test Code for One File

```{r}

# Packages
library(terra)
library(rhdf5)

# Paths

hdf5_path  <- "/Users/miaparker/Desktop/Precipitation Data/GPM_3IMERGM_07-20260326_184742/3B-MO.MS.MRG.3IMERG.19980101-S000000-E235959.01.V07B.HDF5"

modis_path = rast("/Users/miaparker/Desktop/LandCover/LC.h16.2001.tif") ## Different data to grab shape

output_path <- "/Users/miaparker/Desktop/Precipitation Data/test.tif"

# 1. Read HDF5 data

hdf_file <- hdf5_path

# Check structure if needed
h5ls(hdf_file)


precip <- h5read(hdf_file, "/Grid/precipitation")  # adjust path if needed
lat <- h5read(hdf_file, "/Grid/lat")
lon <- h5read(hdf_file, "/Grid/lon")


diff(lat)[1:5]
diff(lon)[1:5]

# Convert to matrix
precip <- precip[,,1]


precip[precip < -9000] <- NA
precip <- precip[nrow(precip):1, ]

image(lat, lon, precip)


# 2. Create raster in lat/lon

r <- rast(
  nrows = length(lat),
  ncols = length(lon),
  xmin = min(lon),
  xmax = max(lon),
  ymin = min(lat),
  ymax = max(lat),
  crs = "EPSG:4326"
)

values(r) <- precip


plot(r, main = "GPM precipitation - tile region")



# 3. Load MODIS reference raster

modis <- modis_path



# 4. Reproject + align to MODIS

r_aligned <- project(
  r,
  modis,
  method = "bilinear"   # nearest neighbor (preserves values)
)

plot(r_aligned)
summary(values(r_aligned))

# 5. Save output

writeRaster(r_aligned, "/Users/miaparker/Desktop/Precipitation Data/test.tif", overwrite=TRUE)

cat("Done! Output saved as imerg_matched.tif\n")
```
# Code for All Files
```{r}

# Paths

hdf_dir <- "/Users/miaparker/Desktop/Precipitation Data/GPM_3IMERGM_07-20260326_183156"
modis_path <- "/Users/miaparker/Desktop/LandCover/LC.h19.2001.tif"
output_dir <- "/Users/miaparker/Desktop/Precipitation Data/output_tifs_Chad"

dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

# Load MODIS once
modis <- rast(modis_path)

# Get all HDF5 files
hdf_files <- list.files(hdf_dir, pattern = "\\.HDF5$", full.names = TRUE)


# Loop through files

for (file in hdf_files) {

  cat("Processing:", basename(file), "\n")

  # Read data

  precip <- h5read(file, "/Grid/precipitation")
  lat <- h5read(file, "/Grid/lat")
  lon <- h5read(file, "/Grid/lon")

  precip <- precip[,,1]

  # Clean data
  precip[precip < -9000] <- NA
  precip <- precip[nrow(precip):1, ]


  # Create raster

  r <- rast(
    nrows = length(lat),
    ncols = length(lon),
    xmin = min(lon),
    xmax = max(lon),
    ymin = min(lat),
    ymax = max(lat),
    crs = "EPSG:4326"
  )

  values(r) <- precip


  # Align to MODIS

  r_aligned <- project(
    r,
    modis,
    method = "bilinear"
  )


  # Save output

  out_name <- paste0(
    tools::file_path_sans_ext(basename(file)),
    ".tif"
  )

  out_path <- file.path(output_dir, out_name)

  writeRaster(r_aligned, out_path, overwrite = TRUE)

  cat("Saved:", out_name, "\n\n")
}

cat("ll files processed!\n")
```




# Check Placement on World
```{r}
library(terra)
library(rnaturalearth)

r_aligned = rast("/Users/miaparker/Desktop/LandCover/LC.h16.2001.tif")

# ---- WORLD MAP ----
world <- ne_countries(scale = "medium", returnclass = "sf")
world_vect <- vect(world)
world_vect <- project(world_vect, crs(r_aligned))


# ---- CHECK CRS FIRST (CRITICAL) ----
plot(r_aligned, col = hcl.colors(100, "YlGnBu", rev=TRUE), main = "IMERG aligned")
plot(world_vect, add = TRUE, border = "black", lwd = 1)
```


# Compare Data Files
```{r}

plot(
  r,
  col = terrain.colors(50),
  main = "IMERG Precipitation",
  xlim = c(-30, 0),
  ylim = c(0, 30)
)
plot(r_aligned)
```
